ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
IF(ISNEW(), IF( UPPER(Name) == UPPER(VLOOKUP( $ObjectType.Portfolio_Name__c.Fields.Name, $ObjectType.Portfolio_Name__c.Fields.Name, Name)),true , false),
AND(ISCHANGED(Name), IF( UPPER(Name) == UPPER(VLOOKUP($ObjectType.Portfolio_Name__c.Fields.Name, $ObjectType.Portfolio_Name__c.Fields.Name, Name)),true,false)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Portfolio Name already used, please use different Portfolio Name
